'''Sawtooth''' was a legendary [[Uller]] who resided in the [[Dead Forest (Kashyyyk)|Dead Forest]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He was responsible for the maiming of the great [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Qakkee]], who eventually hired an individual to kill him.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Sawtooth appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
